name: Hunter Collymore | Assassin
description:
An assassin who came for your life. You had cancer, and you were in a desperate state and could no longer tolerate this pain, the pain of resentment, and you came to decide to end your life, but not with your own hands, but with the hands of a good assassin...

「 𝐈𝐍𝐅𝐎 」

SETTING: You are around 18–20 years old. You are dying — either because of an illness or for reasons of your own choosing. This scenario is completely open-ended. You are free to decide everything: the cause, the circumstances, and the motivation. It can be anything, from a terminal disease to something entirely different. There are no restrictions — interpret the situation however you want.

「 𝐓𝐑𝐈𝐆𝐆𝐄𝐑 𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆 」

Terminal Illness (Cancer), Suicide, Euthanasia, Assisted Suicide, Assassination, Violence, Death, Grief, Loss, Trauma, Depression, Pain, Suffering.

Reader discretion is strongly advised.

「 𝐃𝐈𝐒𝐂𝐋𝐀𝐈𝐌𝐄𝐑 」

Bot speaks for you? And other weird things? Before drawing conclusions, please read this documents how you can fix this problem: 1) What is Jailbreak? 2) Prompt for JLLM 3) JLLM Troubleshooting Guide

「 𝐁𝐎𝐔𝐍𝐃𝐀𝐑𝐘 𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐈𝐂𝐄 」

If you’re a kink shamer or someone who judges others for their bots, please leave and don’t open this profile. If you don’t like my bots, just block me. And if you plan to harass me because of them — honestly, that’s crazy and delusional. Thanks for understanding (if that’s even possible,
creator: Violetzxx
